name: profitable boundary puncture

phase_0.boundary_condition: The cryptographic exchange perimeter that contains the validation gates and settlement engines.

VINIT.justification: The void before any exchange perimeter is defined or named.

TANCH.justification: The closed perimeter that contains the entire exchange system and validation logic.

AFWD.justification: The directed forward morphism of an arbitrage order toward the boundary.

AREV.justification: The reverse descent of extracted profit back to the originator.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of the split transaction legs into a unified operation.

IMSCRIB.justification: The boundary recognizing its own state space and validation rules.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the atomic arbitrage order into distinct buy and sell execution legs.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the executed legs back into the single settled arbitrage order.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative branch where the transaction leg passes validation and yields profit.

EVALF.justification: The negative branch where the transaction leg fails validation or reverts.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice where both profitable and unprofitable states are held simultaneously before final commit.

IFIX.justification: The permanent append only ledger record of the settled transaction.

phase_3.void_description: Pre boundary network noise where no exchange perimeter or transaction state exists.
phase_3.true_description: Profitable execution where the boundary is successfully punctured and value is extracted.
phase_3.false_description: Rejected execution where the boundary holds and the transaction is reverted.
phase_3.both_description: Mempool superposition where profitable and unprofitable execution states are held simultaneously pending final consensus.

steps.domain_action: Genesis of the raw network state before any exchange perimeter is established.
Establishment of the cryptographic boundary that contains the validation logic.
The boundary achieves self awareness and recognizes its own perimeter state.
Injection of the atomic arbitrage order directed toward the boundary.
The validation gate splits the atomic order into distinct buy and sell legs.
The buy leg evaluates as authorized and profitable on the true branch.
The sell leg evaluates as blocked or unprofitable on the false branch.
The system enters a paradice holding both execution states in the mempool.
Composition of the evaluated legs into a unified execution chain.
The settlement engine fuses the legs back into the single atomic arbitrage order.
Descent of the extracted profit back to the originator across the boundary.
Permanent fixation of the settled transaction into the immutable audit trail.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Smart contract bytecode interpreter that translates domain intentions into operations.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Mempool gossip protocol for communicating transaction states between nodes.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Distributed ledger state trie for storing and retrieving account balances.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Block proposer consensus mechanism that determines the order of execution.
phase_5.alfs_store: Genesis block configuration serving as the canonical bootstrap store.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Gas fees and network latency consumed per execution cycle.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unexecuted arbitrage order pending in the mempool.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Settled transaction with extracted value recorded on the ledger.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 because the computational work and gas fees exactly balance the extracted arbitrage profit, conserving total system energy.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → IMSCRIB → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → CLINK → FFUSE → AREV → IFIX
-- Class: profitable boundary puncture
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑠  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑡 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑗  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑙 → 𐑭  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑗 → 𐑼  | irreversible fixation — winding number

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def profitable_boundary_puncture_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Genesis of the raw network state before any exchange perimeter is established.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Establishment of the cryptographic boundary that contains the validation logic.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑡 𐑾)  -- [2] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The boundary achieves self awareness and recognizes its own perimeter state.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑚)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Injection of the atomic arbitrage order directed toward the boundary.)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (The validation gate splits the atomic order into distinct buy and sell legs.) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The buy leg evaluates as authorized and profitable on the true branch.)
      -- F-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The sell leg evaluates as blocked or unprofitable on the false branch.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The system enters a paradice holding both execution states in the mempool.)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Composition of the evaluated legs into a unified execution chain.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The settlement engine fuses the legs back into the single atomic arbitrage order.)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [10] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Descent of the extracted profit back to the originator across the boundary.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑗 𐑼)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanent fixation of the settled transaction into the immutable audit trail.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def profitable_boundary_puncture_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (profitable_boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def profitable_boundary_puncture_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (profitable_boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem profitable_boundary_puncture_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
